Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A user feedback comment for a specific tool.

toolId.description: The ID of the tool this comment is for.

userId.description: The ID of the user who left the comment (if authenticated).

userName.description: The name of the user who left the comment.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

rating.description: The user's rating of the tool.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the comment was created.
